announcements.title: Fountain Stage Delayed — 30 Minutes
announcements.body: Due to a sound equipment issue, all Fountain Stage performances will begin 30 minutes behind schedule. We apologize for the inconvenience.

announcements.title: Weather Advisory
announcements.body: Light rain is expected this evening. We recommend bringing a rain jacket or poncho. The festival will continue as scheduled.

announcements.title: Say She She — Set Time Change
announcements.body: Say She She's set at the Fountain Stage has moved to 3:30pm. Updated times are reflected in the schedule.

announcements.title: The Linda Lindas — Early Doors
announcements.body: Gates for The Linda Lindas at the Fountain Stage will open 30 minutes early. Arrive by 3:30pm to secure your spot.

announcements.title: Cat Circus — Second Show Added
announcements.body: Due to popular demand, Cat Circus at the Geodesic Domes will perform an additional set at 5:00pm on Saturday.

announcements.title: Welcome to Bumbershoot 2026!
announcements.body: We are so excited to have you here. Check the schedule tab for today's full lineup and don't miss a thing.

announcements.title: New Food Vendors on the South Lawn
announcements.body: Four new food vendors have set up on the South Lawn near Fisher Pavilion. Come check out locally sourced options from 11am onwards.
